case_title: BPBH LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. COOK, TOMMY et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT COOK, TOMMY COOK, CATHY

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, BPBH, LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 430-44TH AVENUE #302, SAN FRANCISCO. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT THERE WILL BE A STAY OF EXECUTION UNTIL 6-30-95, 6PM. IF DEFENDANTS, TOMMY AND CATHY COOK MOVE IN A TIMELY FASHION, RENT AND DAMAGES OF $546 WILL BE WAIVED ALONG WITH COURT COSTS OF $210.00.
